rounds.missing_vision: user added three pillars: monetization lane (V-16), community layer (V-17), hosted dashboard (V-18)
rounds.ballot: V-04+V-05 both approved; V-06,V-09,V-10,V-11,V-12,V-14 all approved; language strategy = full TypeScript migration (phased, erasable-syntax, zero-build) + Rust smarch-core kernel (M3)
rounds.goal_extension: user /goal 2026-07-10: +500 improvement tasks, new-coder lane, full attribution, open-source love
rounds.future-of-coding: user goal 2026-07-11: make SMA/SMARCH the future of coding; gen3 version control 10 years ahead
rounds.internal-release: user 2026-07-12: perfect for internal usage AND release; private overlay; lease-bound proc lifecycle Linux-first, cross-platform-ready

pillars.note: upgraded at G1: full phased TS migration + Rust smarch-core kernel (user ballot '2 & 3')
monetization lane: paid/licensed premium bricks on the license lattice
community layer: onboarding, showcase, public brick submissions with gated review
hosted/self-hosted web dashboard beyond generated HTML
new-coder intro lane: zero-assumed-knowledge guided course (docs/intro), verified try-it commands on the fixture portfolio
literate, lovingly-explained open source: WHY headers in every tool, explained doc intros, first-contribution path, code of conduct, made-with-love identity
code-quality dogma: strict TS, type-aware lint (strictTypeChecked), knip/jscpd, coverage floor, typed errors universal — enforced by gates, written as doctrine (docs/CODE_QUALITY.md)

Gen3 as version control 10 years ahead: the unit of change is intent+evidence+trust, not bytes — intent commits, evidence-attached history, agent-native merge, trust-weighted blame (docs/GEN3_VERSION_CONTROL.md)

Private overlay: internal-only surfaces (@sma-private marker + registry/private-overlay.json) that the release pipeline structurally cannot leak; exclusion beats allowlist; WatchDog perf layer is the reference private consumer

SPL — Sweetspot Process Lease (sma spl): every spawned process registers against its lease and lives only while the lease lives; reaper kills only expired-lease processes by pid+start_token, audited; budget-aware dispatch; no stale processes on weak machines; platform seam (Linux now, macOS/Windows additive).

non_goals: hosted SaaS registry federation service (M4+ research; V-18 dashboard is the only hosted surface)
publishing the marketing site / SMA-landing in the public repo
